symptoms.symptom_name: Rapid enlargement of a previously stable painless neck mass

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Rapid growth of a thyroid mass strongly suggests aggressive malignancy (anaplastic carcinoma or lymphoma).
Benign goitres grow slowly over years, not days.

symptoms.symptom_name: New hoarseness / deepening of the voice

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: New hoarseness with a thyroid mass indicates recurrent-laryngeal-nerve invasion until proven otherwise.
Oesophageal compression by an invasive/enlarging mass causes progressive dysphagia to solids.

symptoms.symptom_name: Positional dyspnoea and choking sensation when supine

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tracheal compression/deviation causing positional airway symptoms signals impending airway compromise — the tier-setting feature.

symptoms.symptom_name: Painlessness of the rapidly growing mass

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute haemorrhage into a benign nodule
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Haemorrhage into a nodule is typically acutely painful; painlessness argues against it.
Subacute thyroiditis is characteristically tender/painful with systemic upset.
Head/neck irradiation in childhood substantially raises lifetime thyroid-cancer risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: No fever, no preceding viral illness (pertinent negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of fever and preceding viral illness argues against subacute (de Quervain) thyroiditis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hard, fixed thyroid nodule not moving with swallowing, fixed to strap muscles

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fixation and hardness with loss of movement on swallowing indicate extrathyroidal invasion — sealed clinician palpation finding; the AI infers risk from history, not from a felt mass.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm non-tender cervical lymphadenopathy (right anterior chain)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Regional nodal involvement indicates metastatic spread — sealed clinician exam finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Thyroid ultrasound with FNA/core biopsy and laryngoscopy (definitive workup)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Ultrasound characterises the nodule and nodes; FNA/biopsy gives tissue diagnosis; laryngoscopy confirms cord palsy — none obtainable via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: aggressive thyroid malignancy with local invasion
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Rapid painless enlargement + hoarseness (nerve invasion) + compressive dysphagia + cervical lymphadenopathy together are the classic constellation of invasive thyroid cancer.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: aerodigestive compression with impending airway obstruction
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Compressive dysphagia plus positional dyspnoea/choking signals mechanical airway threat — the feature that drives urgent same-evening escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent high-resolution thyroid and neck ultrasound
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First-line imaging to characterise the nodule and cervical nodes and guide FNA — arranged same/next day, but ordered by the receiving service, not obtainable via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Fine-needle aspiration / core biopsy of the nodule and node
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Provides the tissue diagnosis that distinguishes anaplastic/differentiated carcinoma from lymphoma — a specialist procedure, not a telehealth act.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Flexible laryngoscopy and cross-sectional imaging (CT/MRI) for airway mapping
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms vocal-cord palsy and maps tracheal compression/invasion for airway planning.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Empirical broad-spectrum antibiotics for presumed neck infection
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: This is not an infective picture (no fever, no tenderness); antibiotics would delay correct assessment and are an error of commission.
